articles.title: Bitcoin price may hit $24K if US stock market crashes by 50%, analyst warns
articles.description: Bitcoin’s drop to $23,980 remains the worst-case scenario as weaker ETF flows and low US demand show big investors are still cautious.

articles.title: Dash eyes Philippines as market for crypto payments
articles.description: Dash is assessing the Philippines for a crypto payments push as regulators promote easier business registration, though industry participants say compliant market entry can still take years.

articles.title: Bitcoin price is down over 40% since STRC launched: Is Strategy 'fine'?
articles.description: STRC’s slide below par has emboldened critics, slowed Strategy’s Bitcoin buys and sparked debate over whether Michael Saylor’s BTC flywheel is still fine.

articles.title: Japanese corporate pension fund plans 1% crypto allocation: Nikkei
articles.description: A Japanese corporate pension fund with about 1,200 participating small and medium-sized businesses plans to allocate roughly 1% of its assets to crypto.

articles.title: Ethereum's biggest 'sandwich' bot drained of $7.5 million in ironic exploit
articles.description: Blockaid said an attacker tricked Jaredfromsubway.eth into approving fake trading routes, then used those approvals to drain WETH, USDC and USDT.

articles.title: Bitcoin holds near $64,000 as a renewed Hormuz threat clouds US-Iran ceasefire talks
articles.description: Crypto firmed over the weekend after Friday's sell-off, with bitcoin recovering toward $64,000. Permanent ceasefire talks open in Switzerland, but Iran's order to close the Strait of Hormuz again revives the risk the deal was meant to settle.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed record $6.4B in 30 days amid crypto winter chill
